title: Cheaper by the Dozen
writer: Lamar Trotti, Frank B. Gilbreth Jr., Ernestine Gilbreth Carey
actors: Clifton Webb, Myrna Loy, Jeanne Crain
plot: Follows the wife of the persnickety father of her 12 children, who has uniquely humorous methods for dealing with the ordeals such an unwieldy family undoubtedly encounters.
